log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Kender — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:2+10=12 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 22 damage. Kender — Iron Concentration HP: 45/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Kender — Iron Concentration --- HP: 45/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 26 damage. Kender — Iron Concentration HP: 19/67
→ Bite: [d20:3+10=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
→ Bite: [d20:16+10=26 vs AC 14] HIT! 13 damage. Kender — Iron Concentration HP: 6/67
══ ROUND 3 ══
--- Kender — Iron Concentration --- HP: 6/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (6/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kender — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Kender — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Kender — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 9 damage. Kender — Iron Concentration HP: -3/67
→ Concentration save: [d20(ADV):20+8=28 vs DC 10] MAINTAINED!
══ ROUND 1 ══
